description_long: This is a medium-sized shampoo bottle with a transparent, faceted body that reveals a dual-colored liquid interior, split vertically into tan and blue sections. The bottle has a distinctive hourglass shape with broad, angular shoulders and a narrow waist, giving it a modern, ergonomic appearance. At the top, there is a cylindrical pump dispenser with a long, horizontal spout, designed for easy one-handed operation. The pump and neck are opaque white, contrasting with the clear body and the colored contents inside. The surface of the bottle appears smooth and glossy, with no visible branding, text, or decorative graphics. The overall design is sleek and functional, suitable for placement in urban bathrooms, gyms, or public washrooms.
description: A clear, hourglass-shaped shampoo bottle with a white pump dispenser and dual-colored tan and blue liquid inside. The design is modern, smooth, and unbranded.
description_view_0: Front view shows the split of tan and blue liquid inside the clear, faceted bottle, with the white pump centered at the top.
description_view_1: Side view displays the tan liquid dominating the visible area, with the pump spout extending to the left.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the blue liquid on the right and tan on the left, with the pump directly above.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows mostly blue liquid, with the pump spout extending to the right.
attribute_bottle_silhouette: hourglass-shaped with broad, angular shoulders and a narrow waist
